outcomes.safeEvidenceSummary: D Legal has not completed the provider terms review; automated access, internal storage, public display, commercial use, derived signal use, attribution, retention, and redistribution remain unconfirmed.
outcomes.remainingRisk: D must review the actual provider terms for the chosen TWII source before this slot can move toward accepted.

outcomes.safeEvidenceSummary: No internal feed owner or approval path has been identified for TWII use; project use cannot be authorized through an internal feed route yet.
outcomes.remainingRisk: A responsible owner and approval path must be named before internal feed data can support source-rights or runtime promotion decisions.

outcomes.safeEvidenceSummary: TWII field-contract planning exists but still needs a bounded repair before acceptance; PM must confirm the minimum index fields, trading date, session/calendar handling, timezone, precision, optional OHLC or turnover handling, revision policy, and daily_prices mapping.
outcomes.remainingRisk: The smallest blocker is a final no-secret field-contract decision that maps TWII safely without implying source-rights approval or real-data readiness.

outcomes.safeEvidenceSummary: TWII asset-mapping planning exists but still needs a bounded repair before acceptance; PM must confirm the approved index identifier, internal asset key, coverage-row recognition path, and daily_prices mapping path without exposing row payloads or stock-id payloads.
outcomes.remainingRisk: The smallest blocker is a final no-secret TWII asset mapping decision before coverage rows or scoring can recognize TWII safely.
